problem id: da7288cb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11001110 -> 11010011
  01100000 -> 00011000
  00111001 -> 10011110
  01000001 -> 00000000
  00000011 -> 00110000
  00001110 -> 11100011
  10111100 -> 11101111
  01011010 -> 10110110
  00101110 -> 11101011

query: 11110101
predicted answer: 01101101
